name: Skill Workshop
description: Captures repeatable workflows as workspace skills, with pending review, safe writes, and skill prompt refresh.

autoCapture.label: Auto Capture
autoCapture.help: Detect user corrections and reusable workflow instructions after agent turns.

approvalPolicy.label: Approval Policy
approvalPolicy.help: Store learned skill changes as pending suggestions, or write them automatically.

reviewMode.label: Review Mode
reviewMode.help: Choose heuristic capture, threshold LLM review, both, or no automatic capture.

maxPending.label: Max Pending
maxPending.help: Maximum pending skill suggestions to keep per workspace.
